top_signals.title: Dutch authorities arrest men suspected of providing infrastructure for Russian cyber operations
top_signals.summary: Investigators seized more than 800 servers as they arrested two men suspected of violating European sanctions and assisting pro-Russian cyberattacks and disinformation campaigns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: French Open fans and players try to beat heat at sweltering Roland Garros
top_signals.summary: Roland Garros's medical staff treated 25 people on on Monday and about 15 by the middle of Tuesday afternoon, fire and safety officer Michel Franco Durand said.

top_signals.title: Microsoft: Domain Controller lookup may fail on Windows Server 2016
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has confirmed a new known issue affecting Windows Server 2016 systems that causes domain controller lookups to fail after installing the KB5087537 May 2026 security update. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CISA to allow researchers to report vulnerabilities to exploited bugs catalog
top_signals.summary: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) announced the creation of a nomination form on Thursday that they said enables “researchers, vendors, and industry partners” to report bugs that need to be added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
